Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) // &UserAdmin.Visible = &Context.Old_Perfil = 3 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &ProTipDef = nullvalue(&ProTipDef) &ProTipCus = nullvalue(&ProTipCus) &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo &ProStsRec = nullvalue(&ProStsRec) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Receitas Produto' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ProRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProTipCus.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' ProTipDef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTORECEITA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCENTROTRABALHO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &CentroTrabalhos) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserAdmin = !'' &etapas.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &etapas.TooltipText = "Etapas" If (&CentroTrabalhos > 0) &etapas.Class = !'ActionBaseColorAttribute' Else &etapas.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ImprimirReceita = !'' &StatusReceita.FromImage(WarningIcon) &StatusReceita.TooltipText = "" ProRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts = Status_Produto.Inativo, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') ProTipCus.ColumnClass = iif(ProTipCus = TipoCusto.Receita, !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') Do Case Case ProTipDef = Definicao.FABRICADO ProTipDef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case ProTipDef = Definicao.SEMIACABADO ProTipDef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case ProTipDef = Definicao.SUBPRODUTO ProTipDef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise ProTipDef.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If ProStsRec = Status_SimNao.Nao &StatusReceita.FromImage(WarningIcon) Else &StatusReceita.FromImage(MenuIcon) EndIF if GrupCtrMax > 0 &etapas.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Else &etapas.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) EndIF EndEvent Event 'Doetapas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpAddEtapas.PopUp(GrupCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInserirProduto' Produtos.Call('WWPRODUTORECEITA', TrnMode.Insert, &WWPContext.EmpCod, 0, '') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DotestaReceitas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_testaReceitas.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_testaReceitas.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_testaReceitas.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action testaReceitas' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWProdutoReceita.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWProdutoReceita.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action testaReceitas' PrcTestaReceitas.Call(&Context.EmpCod, 0) msg('Processo Concluído!') wwProdutoReceita.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROTIPDEF" &ProTipDef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROTIPCUS" &ProTipCus.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTSREC" &ProStsRec.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROTIPDEF", "", not &ProTipDef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProTipDef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROTIPCUS", "", not &ProTipCus.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProTipCus, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", true, 0, &ProSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTSREC", "", not &ProStsRec.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProStsRec, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ProdutoReceita" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &UserAdmin.Click wpProdutoReceita.Link('WWPRODUTORECEITA', EmpCod, ProCod) EndEvent Event &StatusReceita.Click wpVerificaReceita.Popup(&Context.EmpCod, ProCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &ImprimirReceita.Click imprimeReceita.Popup(ProCod) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
